author: Camila Linares
body: Committed! So grateful for everyone who supported me on this journey. This has been a dream since I was 10 years old and I can't believe it's real. See you in Malibu 🌊

comments.author: Kim Collins
comments.text: So proud of you! Well deserved. Pepperdine is getting a gem.

author: Megan Lee
body: That feeling when you get your first college email 💌🎓 Staying focused, staying humble. Just going to keep working. #Blessed #ClassOf2028 #Volleyball

author: Team Bot
body:
👋 Good morning SC Rockstar 16U families!

🥪 LUNCH ORDER REMINDER
Tournament days are long — let's make sure everyone is fueled up!

Please submit your lunch orders for Red Rock Rave #2 (April 4–6) by Wednesday March 25 at 11:59 PM.

Order here → [lunch order link]

📦 What's available:
- Sandwich + chips + drink — $14
- Burrito bowl + drink — $13
- Snack pack (fruit, granola, nuts, bar) — $8

🚗 CARPOOL COORDINATION
3 families still need rides to Las Vegas. 2 families have offered seats. Reply below or use the carpool board to coordinate.

💊 MEDICAL FORMS
4 athletes have not submitted updated medical release forms for the season. Forms must be on file before tournament day. Submit here → [link]

Questions? I'm here 24/7. Just reply to this post or DM the team channel.

— Team Bot 🤖
Powered by Scoutly for SC Rockstar 16U

comments.author: Jennifer L.
comments.text: Submitted! Also added our family to the carpool board — we have 2 extra seats 🙌

author: SC Rockstar Volleyball
body: Massive weekend for our 16U Open squad. 3 players recording career-high dig sets, Sofia commits to Pepperdine, and a first-place finish at the Red Rock Rave qualifier. This team is built different. 🏐🔥

author: Katie Torres
body: First tournament of the season in the books ✅ Rough start but we figured it out by day 2. Growth 🏐 Big thanks to our coaching staff for pushing us when we needed it most.

author: Taylor Marcos
body: Big West Qualifier weekend in the books. 28 digs, 96% passing across 6 matches. The grind doesn't stop.

author: SC Rockstar Volleyball
body: 12 D1 coaches will be at the SoCal Qualifier this weekend. Get your Scoutly profiles updated before Friday.

milestone.detail: Long Beach CC · 16U Open · 12 D1 coaches attending

author: Brooke Rivera
body: Weekend tournament recap 📸 Went 4-1 in pool play, lost in semis but learned a TON. Already can't wait for Far Westerns. Also my serve receive is finally clicking — coach was happy 😄🏐

author: Anika Kapoor
body: Grateful for the coverage. Keep putting in the work and people notice.

prQuote.text: Kapoor led the tournament in kills with 47 over two days, drawing attention from four D1 programs.

author: Jessie Chen
body: Commit szn is wild right now 👀 So happy for all my club sisters finding their homes. Our class is going to be STACKED at the next level. My time is coming. Back to work 💪 #ClubVball #Recruiting #ClassOf2027

author: SC Rockstar Volleyball
body:
Logistics for the SoCal Qualifier this weekend:

📍 Long Beach Convention Center
⏰ Check-in 7:00am · Pool play 8:00am
🏐 16U Open bracket starts Saturday
📋 Roster confirmation deadline: Thursday 6pm

All players must have updated Scoutly profiles with 2025 film before stepping on the court.

milestone.detail: Long Beach CC · Gate 4 · Arrive by 7:00am

author: Jordan Ruiz
body: First D1 offer. This is what we worked for. Every early morning, every late night — it was all worth it.

milestone.text: Received an offer from UC Davis

author: SC Rockstar Volleyball
body: 🚨 Coach alert: 8 D1 programs have viewed SC Rockstar 16U profiles on Scoutly this week including programs from the Big West, WCC, and Pac-12. Make sure your stats, film, and contact info are current. This is the window.
